title: AREA AGENCY ON AGING - 211info
text: CENTRAL OFFICE AREA AGENCY ON AGING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Area Agencies on Aging (AAA) provide a range of services to help older adults live safe, healthy, and independent lives. 209 SW 4th Avenue Suite 510 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Age 60 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Area Agencies on Aging Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MEDICARE SAVINGS CONNECT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - ADULT CARE OPTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PUBLIC GUARDIAN AND CONSERVATOR PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - HOARDING RESOURCES PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SNAP, MEDICAID, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTRAL OFFICE
